messages.text:
Hello! I'm Salil's AI agent.
I'll walk you through everything — his experience, tech stack, and the projects he's built. Ask away, or just watch.

**Salil V Nair** is a Senior Software Engineer with **11+ years** of experience building enterprise-grade software.

He started in December 2014 and has been writing production Java ever since — evolving from telecom systems all the way to building AI-powered conversational engines.
What does his experience look like?

**🗓 Dec 2014** — Joined the industry. Java, Telecom, SOAP/REST.
**⚡ 2016–2019** — Deep Spring Boot, Hibernate, Oracle. Enterprise APIs.
**🌐 2019–2022** — Frontend expansion: React, Angular, TypeScript.
**🤖 2022–2026** — LLM integration, AI agent frameworks, open-source.

**Today:** Still shipping. Still learning.

**Primary languages:** Java · TypeScript · JavaScript · Python
**Frameworks:** Spring Boot · React · Angular · Hibernate
**Databases:** Oracle · MongoDB
**Networking:** RESTful · SOAP · Telecom Configs
**Also fluent in:** HTML · CSS · XML · Lua Scripting · SwiftUI
**OS:** macOS · Linux · Windows
Tell me about ConvEngine — his flagship project.

**ConvEngine** is a deterministic, database-driven conversational workflow engine — think enterprise chatbots with superpowers.

🔧 **15-step DAG-resolved pipeline** per conversation turn
🧠 **MCP tool orchestration** with 7+ executor adapters
📊 **Full audit timeline** + SSE/STOMP real-time streaming
⚡ **Rule engine** with 6 execution phases
🔒 **Guardrails, state graphs, disambiguation** — all DB-configurable
🌐 Multi-dialect SQL: Oracle · Postgres · SQLite

Currently at **v2.0.12** and actively evolving.

He's shipped an entire open-source ecosystem:

📚 **convengine-docs** — Docusaurus v3 site, dual versioning, custom MDX components
💬 **convengine-chat** — React library: drop `<ConvEngineChat />` into any project
📊 **excelprocessor** — Annotation-based Excel read/write/validate for Java (v3.1.3)
🔌 **api-processor** — Facade→Handler→Delegate pattern for REST/SOAP integrations
🔍 **json-validator** — Annotation-based JSON validation with conditional tasks
📦 **jsonprocessor** — JSON toolkit: validator + path utils + REST utils
🎭 **mockey** — Lightweight mock API server built on Express
How can I explore his work?

Everything is open source on **GitHub → github.com/salilvnair**

All libraries are published on **Maven Central** and actively maintained.

↓ Scroll down to explore every project in detail — with descriptions, tech stacks, feature highlights, and direct GitHub links.
